name: IncidentUpdateAttributes
description: Attributes to update on an existing incident

title.description: The updated title of the incident

state.description: The updated state of the incident (transitioning to resolved records resolution time)

severity.description: The updated severity level of the incident

customer_impacted.description: Updated flag indicating whether the incident has customer impact

customer_impact_scope.description: Updated description of the customer impact scope

customer_impact_end.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when customer impact ended (set when marking impact as resolved)

fields.description: Updated custom field values for the incident

notification_handles.description: Updated list of notification handles for the incident
